---
title: "English Hymnology Reprinted, with additions and corrections, from the Monthly Packet"
---

## English Hymnology Reprinted, with additions and corrections, from the Monthly Packet

**Author:** The Rev. Louis Coutier Biggs
**Date:** 1873
**Imprint:** London: Mozley

### Notes

This originally appeared as a series of articles on \'English Hymnology\' in <i>MP</i> (July 1867-June 1868).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
